default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, review recent deliverables, and plan next steps for Outreach's content marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [3 blogs delivered last week received positive feedback; minor edits needed for more conversational tone](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [43 new blog assignments proposed, categorized by topic clusters like AI workflow automation and revenue ops](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Looker dashboard being set up to integrate Google Search Console and Analytics data](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Outreach's brand presence in LLM responses increasing, especially compared to competitors](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Opportunity identified to leverage Reddit for faster LLM pickup of content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)

## Topics

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [3 blogs delivered last week received minimal edits, especially from PMMs](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Suggestion to make language more casual/conversational, particularly in intros and transitions](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
  - [Team to update writing guidelines to incorporate more "plain-spokenness" in content](https://fathom.video/share/ZYpe8gb8FT4fwDtY5DcbrsZL892SKvoY?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### New Content Strategy and Assignments
